steps.title: Port toolu-runner-shared (types + startup)
Port toolu-runner-protocol (sync, no I/O, restricted dep list, recorded fixtures)
steps.check: cargo test -p toolu-runner-protocol && ! cargo tree -p toolu-runner-protocol | grep -E 'reqwest|tokio|opendal|bollard|axum'

steps.title: Port toolu-runner reporting/ subtree (feature_detection, log_upload, results_service, run_service, timeline)
Port toolu-runner docker/, node/, plugin/ subtrees (with light edits to plugin/* to drop yamless refs)
Port toolu-runner execution/ core (context, steps_runner, job_runner, expressions, actions, artifacts, cache, workflow, oidc, secret_masker)
Port toolu-runner execution/handlers/ (script, node, docker, composite, resolve, handler_emit, mod)
Wire secret_masker into the tracing layer (startup::init accepts a SecretMasker; redaction unit test in toolu-runner-shared)
Add toolu-runner::net (async network: exchange_token, session, acquire/renew/complete job, log upload)
Wire the listener (handler, execution_loop, job_lifecycle, helpers, setup_step, step_reporter, log_uploader)
Build the CLI (clap: register, run, remove, status)
steps.check: cargo run -p toolu-runner -- --help && cargo run -p toolu-runner -- register --help

steps.title: Wire the 12 failure modes incl. YAMLESS_* env var warning (file lock, no-config exit 2, expired-token, two-run lock, mid-job remove)
Implement config.toml + ~/.toolu-runner/ storage layout (lock file, pending_remove, _diag logs, expand_tilde in shared)
First live smoke against github.com (register, run, no-op job, populate docs/known-bugs.md; deferred path with owner if blocked on user)
steps.check: grep -q '^## Live smoke' docs/known-bugs.md && grep -q '^## Known bugs' docs/known-bugs.md

steps.title: Real-data test suite for all 23 ACs (unit + live; yamless mock tests NOT ported)
Live harness infrastructure (tests/live/, --features live, workflow_dispatch + nightly)
install.sh (arch + OS detect, release artifact download, --service flag)
steps.check: bash -n install.sh && (bash install.sh --help 2>&1 || bash install.sh 2>&1) | head -5

steps.title: Service files: scripts/io.toolu-runner.plist + scripts/toolu-runner.service
steps.check: xmllint --noout scripts/io.toolu-runner.plist 2>/dev/null; systemd-analyze verify scripts/toolu-runner.service 2>/dev/null; test -f scripts/io.toolu-runner.plist && test -f scripts/toolu-runner.service

steps.title: Prose docs: README, CLAUDE, architecture, CHANGELOG (v0.1.0), known-bugs
steps.check: test -f README.md && test -f CLAUDE.md && test -f docs/architecture.md && test -f CHANGELOG.md && test -f docs/known-bugs.md

steps.title: CI matrix: ci.yml (default), live.yml, live-ghes.yml; AC #19 and #22 wired as CI steps
Final v1 acceptance pass (walk all 23 ACs; defer any unfixed listener bugs to v1.1 with owner)
